# DevelopedByDean

> Dean Holland is an Anthropic Certified AI Developer who builds custom AI voice agents, AI websites, and workflow automation systems for small and mid-size businesses. Solo operator — clients work directly with Dean, no agency middlemen, no account managers.

## About
Dean Holland is an independent AI developer and systems engineer. He holds the Anthropic Certified AI Developer credential and specializes in production-grade AI integrations: voice agents that answer calls 24/7, websites that capture and qualify leads automatically, and workflow automations that connect CRMs, calendars, inboxes, and payment systems. Contact: dean@bknddevelopment.com

## Services
- [AI Voice Agents](/services/ai-voice-agents) — Custom AI phone agents that answer, qualify, and book calls 24/7 with calendar and CRM sync.
- [AI Websites](/services/ai-websites) — Fast, persuasive websites built to convert traffic into qualified leads and booked calls.
- [Workflow Automation](/services/workflow-automation) — Automation systems that connect CRMs, forms, inboxes, and payments to remove repetitive admin work.
- [Lead Generation Systems](/services/lead-generation-systems) — Capture, qualification, scoring, and routing systems with automated follow-up.
- [AI Chatbots](/services/ai-chatbot-development) — Custom website chatbots trained on your business that qualify leads and handle support around the clock.
- [AI Appointment Booking](/services/ai-appointment-booking) — Self-service scheduling systems with smart reminders that fill calendars and reduce no-shows.
- [CRM Automation](/services/crm-automation) — Lead routing, follow-up triggers, and pipeline management automation across HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Salesforce, and more.
- [AI Follow-Up Systems](/services/ai-follow-up-systems) — Sub-minute lead response, multi-step nurture sequences, and reactivation campaigns for dormant leads.

## Industries
- [AI for Home Services](/industries/home-services-ai) — AI call answering, lead qualification, and dispatch follow-up for HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical, and cleaning businesses.
- [AI for Med Spas](/industries/medical-spa-ai) — Consultation funnels, treatment qualification, and reactivation flows for aesthetic clinics.
- [AI for Law Firms](/industries/law-firm-ai) — Intake automation, case screening, and practice-area routing for law firms.
- [AI for Real Estate](/industries/real-estate-ai) — Instant lead response, buyer/seller qualification, showing booking, and long-term nurture for agents and teams.
- [AI for Dental Practices](/industries/dental-practice-ai) — Online booking, no-show reduction, and lapsed-patient reactivation for dental offices.
- [AI for Insurance Agencies](/industries/insurance-agency-ai) — Quote follow-up, renewal automation, and cross-sell triggers for independent agencies.
- [AI for Auto Dealerships](/industries/auto-dealership-ai) — Instant internet-lead response, test drive booking, and service department retention.
- [AI for Fitness Studios](/industries/fitness-studio-ai) — Trial class booking, member retention, and win-back automation for gyms and boutique studios.

- [Homepage](/) — overview and direct strategy call booking

- [AI Readiness Assessment](/assessment) — free interactive tool to identify highest-leverage AI systems for a business
- [Contact](/#contact) — book a free strategy call

## Positioning
- Anthropic Certified AI Developer
- Solo operator: every project designed and built personally by Dean
- Clients work directly with the builder — no agency middlemen
- Pricing typically starts at $2,500 per project; scoped per engagement
- Most projects launch within 2-6 weeks
